body.title: Authentication Error
body.intro: An error occurred during the authentication process. This was not caused by your credentials; otherwise you would have seen a different message on the login page.
body.communicated: The issue has been reported to the platform administrators. If this is a temporary problem, please:
body.try_again: Try again from the service provider's website;
body.wait_retry: If the problem occurs again, wait a few minutes and try again;
body.support_ticket: If the problem persists for more than one hour, please contact support using the channels provided by your organization.
body.in_most_cases: In most cases, these are temporary issues related to platform updates or maintenance.
